name: Bluetooth BLE Support
icon: <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="m7 7 10 10-5 5V2l5 5L7 17"></path></svg>

blocks.label: BLE Init
blocks.codeTemplate:
from ble_uart import BLEUART
import bluetooth
_ble = bluetooth.BLE()
_uart = BLEUART(_ble, name="{{name}}")

blocks.label: BLE Receive
blocks.hint: Check for and read incoming Bluetooth data
